register(bytes32).details: Salt must satisfy the 32-bit proof-of-work requirement.      Mine off-chain with VirtualMaster.mineSalt() from ox/tempo.

claim(bytes6,address,uint256,bytes32).notice: Pull-based fallback — a recipient claims their share of a stuck deposit.

processDeposit(bytes6,address,uint256,by.notice: Process a single deposit. Callable by anyone (keeper or recipient).

register(bytes32).notice: Register this contract as a TIP-1022 virtual master.
